approvedClaims: An invited GitHub collaborator with repository access can clone the repository and start local learning through the explicit command wrapper.
Local marketplace packaging and isolated CODEX_HOME install are verified.
First-run support diagnostics and non-destructive repair guidance are verified.
blockedClaims: Unauthenticated public HTTPS clone is not verified while the repository is private.
Public Git-backed plugin install is not verified.
Realtime voice and real learner outcome claims remain outside the first-complete release claim.
publicReleaseRequirements: Make the repository public or publish a separate public distribution artifact.
Run the default public clone smoke without ENGLISH_LEARNING_ALLOW_PRIVATE_CLONE_SMOKE.
Add a public install smoke before documenting Git-backed plugin install.
Update README, STATUS, ISSUE-INDEX, dashboard, and GitHub issue state.
claimBoundary: This policy chooses private beta / invited-user clone-to-learn as the M6 first-complete distribution claim. It does not claim unauthenticated public release.
